title: Peruvian Stuffed Potatoes Rellena
description: A traditional Peruvian dish filled with a flavorful mix of cheese, herbs, and spices, baked to perfection.

ingredients.name: Peruvian potatoes (4-5 medium)
ingredients.notes: Look for high-starch potatoes like papas amarillas or papas blancas.

ingredients.name: intricately spiced cheese
ingredients.notes: A mix of queso fresco, parmesan, and mozzarella works well.

ingredients.name: chopped fresh cilantro
ingredients.notes: Fresh herbs add brightness to the dish.

ingredients.name: minced garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince garlic and sauté with the onions for added depth.

ingredients.name: diced red onion
ingredients.notes: Caramelize the onions for a sweet and savory flavor.

ingredients.name: olive oil
ingredients.notes: Use a neutral oil for roasting the potatoes.

instructions: Scrub the potatoes clean and poke some holes in each with a fork.
Rub the potatoes with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
Bake the potatoes for 45-60 minutes, or until tender when pierced with a fork.
While the potatoes are baking, sauté the onions and garlic in a pan until caramelized.
Add the chopped cilantro and spiced cheese to the pan and stir to combine.
When the potatoes are done, let them cool for a few minutes.
Slice the potatoes in half lengthwise and fluff the flesh with a fork.
Spoon the cheesy onion mixture into the potato cavities and serve hot.
Garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
